data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Preferred channel override at subscription level'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Preferred channel override at subscription level', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the business process, such as creating offers and handling bookings, but none of them mention or validate the preferred channel override. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: Preferred channel override at subscription level is not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
